---
title: "\'Seed time at Oxford\'"
---

## \'Seed time at Oxford\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1891
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (May 1891) 495-502

### Notes

This is a review of Anne Mozley\'s edition of Newman\'s early correspondence and of R. W. Church\'s The Oxford Movement.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
